elements.title: Arceuthobium mengeanum
elements.contents: ... that the lost Arceuthobium mengeanum mistletoe fossils (illustrated) were possibly entombed in "sea amber"?

elements.title: John Kinloch Anderson
elements.contents: ... that John Kinloch Anderson tested ancient Greek horse riding techniques?

elements.title: one of the Emperor's consorts
elements.contents: ... that the Wanli Emperor opposed naming his eldest son heir because his mother, though one of the Emperor's consorts, had once been a palace servant?

elements.title: Bill Bray
elements.contents: ... that Michael Jackson once thanked Bill Bray "for being a father" to him?

elements.title: Mermaid Melody Pichi Pichi Pitch
elements.contents: ... that the manga Mermaid Melody Pichi Pichi Pitch was created to market the E-kara karaoke toy to young girls?

elements.title: Kailey Utley
elements.contents: ... that Kailey Utley took a break from her optometry career to become a professional soccer player?

elements.title: fourth novel
elements.contents: ... that Jacqueline Wilson wrote a fourth novel in her Hetty Feather series despite only planning to write a trilogy?

elements.title: Be Sweet to Me
elements.contents: ... that the title of Violet Grohl's debut album Be Sweet to Me began as an in-joke between her and her best friend?

elements.title: Paulus Samador da Cunha
elements.contents: ... that Paulus Samador da Cunha lost a vote to become the regent of Sikka, but was appointed anyway?
